evals.prompt: Set up Supabase Auth in Next.js App Router
evals.expected: Provides createServerClient setup for server context and createBrowserClient for client context, with correct cookie handling. References @supabase/ssr package.

evals.prompt: Protect a route using Next.js middleware with Supabase
evals.expected: Produces middleware.ts with createServerClient, calls getUser() to validate session, redirects unauthenticated users to /login, and returns supabaseResponse to propagate cookie updates.

evals.prompt: Handle OAuth callback in Next.js App Router with Supabase
evals.expected: Produces app/auth/callback/route.ts that reads the 'code' query param and calls supabase.auth.exchangeCodeForSession(code), then redirects to the 'next' param or '/'.

evals.prompt: Why does my Supabase session keep expiring in a Server Component?
evals.expected: Explains that getSession() is client-side only; Server Components must use getUser() to validate against Supabase Auth server. Also checks that middleware is running to refresh cookies.
